ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose profile is being stored */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification type */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification type (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the content */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the post is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are being stored */,
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification type */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user wants to receive notifications of this type */,
  "custom_notification_sound" TEXT /* Custom notification sound chosen by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification on which the action was taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., 'seen', 'dismissed', 'liked') */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked another user */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)
